title: Lite Legacy Resources
description: Lite Legacy Resources is a resource pack that adds on optional content for Lite Legacy, the performance based modpack. It works with any modpack that uses Legacy4J!
body:
# Lite Legacy Resources
**Lite Legacy Resources** is a resource pack that adds on optional content for Lite Legacy, the performance based Legacy4J modpack. It works with any modpack that uses Legacy4J!


![sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12f06addfc3c7680fe4ff35273544b963f69fef3.png)

Currently not sponsored, join our Discord and contact one of the higher ups if you want to sponsor us.
